2026-04-06T16:47:15.0573264Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-06T16:47:15.0573828Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-06T16:47:15.0574264Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-06T16:47:15.0574643Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-06T16:47:15.0574973Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-06T16:47:15.0575224Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-06T16:47:15.0575395Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-06T16:47:15.0575581Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-06T16:47:15.0575756Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-06T16:47:15.0575995Z [36;1m{[0m
2026-04-06T16:47:15.0576208Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_api_key=${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-06T16:47:15.0576504Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-06T16:47:15.0576766Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m

At line 72, it calls `root.GetProperty(\\u0026#34;status\\u0026#34;)` on the JSON response, which throws `KeyNotFoundException` when the `status` property is missing from the snapshot.\\n\\nThis is a race condition: the GET request occasionally returns a response JSON object that is missing the `status` (or `output`) property, likely because the snapshot was captured in an intermediate state during concurrent event emission.\\n\\n### Build Link\\nhttps://dev.azure.com/azure-sdk/29ec6040-b234-4e31-b139-33dc4287b756/_apis/build/builds/6109110/logs/1263\\n\\n### Suggested Fix\\nEither:\\n1. Fix the underlying snapshot serialization to always include `status` and `output` fields even during concurrent writes, or\\n2. Make the test resilient to intermediate states by using `TryGetProperty` and skipping snapshots that are not yet fully formed.\",\"state\":\"open\",\"html_url\":\"https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/57815\",\"user\":{\"login\":\"m-nash\",\"id\":64171366,\"profile_url\":\"https://github.com/m-nash\",\"avatar_url\":\"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/64171366?v=4\"},\"author_association\":\"MEMBER\",\"labels\":[\"bug\"],\"reactions\":{\"total_count\":1,\"+1\":0,\"-1\":0,\"laugh\":0,\"confused\":0,\"heart\":0,\"hooray\":0,\"rocket\":0,\"eyes\":1},\"created_at\":\"2026-04-06T16:45:16Z\",\"updated_at\":\"2026-04-06T16:45:16Z\"}","type":"text"}]}}}
